creator: a@jenisch.at
text:
On Fri, Jun 14, 2013 at 04:32:54PM -0400, Mark Saad wrote:


> Ewald
>   I see you have 128G of ram in the system , How long did you wait
> before you decided the box was locked up ? I ask as the default
> memory test on 9.1 can take a long time to test the ram .  

Hi Mark,

I definitely waited a *long* time - in fact I left the server running
overnight and it was still stuck at the "USB..." message.

> Can you boot of the box with the following option enabled ?
> "hw.memtest.tests=0" and let me know what the result it.  

Nope, didn't help - same problem as before: The last thing I see is
"usbus0: 12Mbps Full Speed USB v1.0"

> Also have you applied the latest HP firmware updates via SPP 2013-02
> to the box ? If not can you do this and let us know if this improves
> the situation.

Yes, I'm already at the latest firmware-level, i.e. the one that came
out this spring.

-ewald
